scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && tsc --module CommonJS --target ES2020 --moduleResolution Node --resolveJsonModule --esModuleInterop false --strict false --skipLibCheck --types node --noEmitOnError bin/projj.ts && eslint --no-ignore --fix "bin/projj.js" "lib/*.js" "lib/command/*.js" && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); ['bin/projj.js', 'lib/ssh.js'].forEach(file => fs.chmodSync(file, 0o755));"
scripts.clean: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.rmSync('bin/projj.js', { force: true }); fs.rmSync('lib', { recursive: true, force: true });"
scripts.smoke:add: npm run build && node -r ts-node/register/transpile-only test/smoke_add.ts
scripts.test: npm run lint -- --fix && npm run test-local
scripts.test-local: npm run build && egg-bin test --ts --tscompiler ts-node/register/transpile-only
scripts.cov: npm run build && egg-bin cov --ts --tscompiler ts-node/register/transpile-only
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm run cov
